bird.name: Dusky lory
bird.summary: The dusky lory (Chalcopsitta fuscata) is a species of parrot in the subfamily Loriinae of the family Psittaculidae. Alternative common name…

locations.name: 新幾內亞島
locations.summary: 新畿內亞島（英語：New Guinea；巴布亞皮欽語：Niugini；印尼語：Papua）位於澳大利亞北面，是世界上第二大島嶼與最高島嶼。有時，本島亦被稱為「巴布亞」，但有時巴布亞亦單指本島的一部份。此外，印尼官方过去稱呼本島為「伊里安岛…

locations.name: 巴丹塔島
locations.summary: 巴丹塔島是印度尼西亞的島嶼，位於巴布亞省，屬於拉賈安帕特群島四大島嶼之一，面積453平方公里，最高點海拔1,184米，群島其他主要島嶼有米蘇爾島、薩拉瓦蒂島和衛吉島。行政上由拉贾安帕特县管理。

locations.name: 薩拉瓦蒂島
locations.summary: 薩拉瓦蒂島是印度尼西亞的島嶼，位於西巴布亞省（前身為西伊里安查亞省），屬於拉賈安帕特群島四大島嶼之一，面積1,623平方公里，群島其他主要島嶼有米蘇爾島、巴丹塔島和衛吉島。行政上北部由拉贾安帕特县、南部由索龙县管理。 参见 萨拉瓦蒂王国

locations.name: 亞彭島
locations.summary: 亞彭島是印度尼西亞的島嶼，位於西新畿內亞斯考滕群島以南的極樂島灣，西面是努姆島，東南面是安拜群島，西南面是庫蘭群島，島上最高點海拔高度1,496米。由亚彭群岛县负责管理，岛上主要城市是塞鲁伊。 参考资料

locations.name: 印度尼西亚
locations.summary: 印度尼西亞共和国（印尼語：Republik Indonesia，IPA讀音：[rɛpʊblɪk ɪndɔnɛsɪa]），通稱印度尼西亞，簡稱印尼，是位于东南亚的群岛国家；由17,506個岛屿组成，是世界上最大的群島國家，疆域橫跨亞洲及大洋…

locations.name: 巴布亚新几内亚
locations.summary: 巴布亚新几内亚独立国（英語：Independent State of Papua New Guinea），通称巴布亚新几内亚（Papua New Guinea，缩写：PNG；巴布亞皮欽語：Papua Niugini；希里木托語：Papua…

locations.name: 華萊士線
locations.summary: 華萊士線（英語：Wallace's Line）是生物地理學中，區分東洋區（又名極東區）和澳大拉西亞區的分界線。 背景 1854年至1862年，英國動物地理學者亞爾佛德·羅素·華萊士在馬來群島研究島嶼上的動物時，注意到婆羅洲與蘇拉威西島、峇…

relations.subject: Dusky lory
relations.evidence: |last5=Joseph |first5=Leo |date=2015 |title=Molecular phylogenetics suggests a New Guinean origin and frequent episodes of founder-event speciation in the nectarivorous lories and lorikeets (Aves: Psittaciformes) |url=https://linkinghub.elsevier.com/retrieve/pii/S1055790315001232 |journal=Molecular Phylogenetics and Evolution |language=en |volume=90 |pages=34–48 |doi=10.1016/j.ympev.2015.04.021|pmid=25929786 |bibcode=2015MolPE..90...34S |url-access=subscription }} It is native to New Guinea and the offshore islands of Batanta, Salawati and Yapen, where it inhabits a wide range of lowland and montane forest habitats

relations.subject: Dusky lory
relations.evidence: The dusky lory is endemic to Indonesia and Papua New Guinea, encompassing the region between Wallace’s Line and the Pitcairn Island group, and the main island of New Guinea. Its scope also extends to several neighboring tropical islands, including Batanta, Salawati, and Yapen, where it thrives in a diverse array of forested and semi-open environments. This geographic range provides a large extent of occurrence, estimated at 1,210,000 km². This species is highly adaptable, occupying a wide variety of habitats across a broad elevational range. It is most commonly found in lowlands and foothills but has been observed at altitudes as high as 2,700 m on [[Mount Wilhelm|Mt

relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

relations.subject: Dusky lory
relations.evidence: Despite ongoing habitat loss and illegal trade, the dusky lory remains common throughout its range and is currently assessed as Least Concern by the IUCN Red List of Threatened Species
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
